d: Thoran charges up briefly before slashing at enemies within range, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage plus [[180%]] of the damage received during the charge. Additionally, he gains [[20%]] Life Drain and is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while casting this skill.
Increases the extra damage to [[200%]] of damage received during the charge.
If interrupted, Thoran's soul will complete the slash.
Increases the extra damage to [[220%]] of damage received during the charge.
Increases the extra damage to [[240%]] of damage received during the charge.

Thoran targets the enemy with the highest HP who is not affected by Soul Plunder, draining [[18%]] of their current HP to increase his max HP by the same amount. He also makes this enemy receive [[13%]] more damage for the rest of the battle. The HP drained cannot exceed [[600%]] of Thoran's ATK.
Increases drained HP to [[20%]] of the enemy's current HP.
Increases the enemy's received damage by [[16%]] for the rest of the battle.
Increases the enemy's received damage by [[17%]] for the rest of the battle.
Thoran, upon receiving a [[fatal blow|fatal]], will resurrect after a brief time and recover [[40%]]<HP> HP. This effect can be triggered once per battle.
Resurrects with [[50%]]<HP> HP.
Resurrects with [[60%]]<HP> HP.
Gains [[500]] Energy when the skill is triggered.
Thoran's normal attacks and skills increase his Energy Recovery by [[24%]]. His Energy Recovery is increased by an extra [[6%]] when Resurrection is not triggered.
Thoran's normal attacks and skills increase his Energy Recovery by [[32%]]. His Energy Recovery is increased by an extra [[8%]] when Resurrection is not triggered.
Thoran's normal attacks and skills increase his Energy Recovery by [[40%]]. His Energy Recovery is increased by an extra [[10%]] when Resurrection is not triggered.

Thoran signs a pact with the ally placed [[1 tile behind]] him before a battle starts, agreeing to take [[50%]] damage for them until the battle ends. When Thoran receives a [[fatal blow|fatal]], this ally sacrifices [[85%]] of their current HP to save and heal Thoran by [[150%]] of this amount. After that, Thoran no longer takes damage for this ally.
While the pact is active, [[25%]] of the damage dealt by this ally can heal Thoran.
Increases the healing amount that Thoran receives from the ally's damage dealt to [[30%]].
Increases the healing amount that Thoran receives from the ally's damage dealt to [[35%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Crit Resist, 15 Ranged DEF, 10 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Thoran drains another [[20%]] of the current HP from all enemies affected by Soul Plunder when casting Soul Retaliation, increasing his max HP by the same amount.
